title: Framework Integration Recap
concept: Reviewing how Crew, Graph, and Custom state-machines map to different problem sets.

exercises.prompt: What is the final step in the lifecycle of an Agent Run?
exercises.explain: Database persistence is where results of an agent's run are stored after evaluation.

cards.title: Understanding State-Machines
cards.body: State-machines are tools that help agents make decisions based on their current situation. Different types manage various problem sets.

cards.title: Crew State-Machine
cards.body: The Crew state-machine is designed for tasks that involve coordination among multiple agents, like team projects.

cards.title: Graph State-Machine
cards.body: Think of the Graph state-machine as a map. It helps agents find the best route through a set of connected points, making choices based on relationships.

cards.title: Custom State-Machine
cards.body: A Custom state-machine is like a recipe. You can adapt it to fit specific tasks, creating unique paths for different challenges.

cards.title: Myth: All State-Machines Are the Same
cards.body: It's a myth that all state-machines function identically. Each type is suited for different tasks, just like not all vehicles work for the same terrain.

cards.title: Mapping the State-Machines
cards.body: Each type of state-machine addresses unique kinds of problems.

exercises.prompt: Which state-machine is best for coordinating multiple agents?
exercises.explain: The Crew state-machine is specifically designed for tasks that require teamwork among agents.

exercises.prompt: Custom state-machines can only be used in standard tasks.
exercises.explain: False. Custom state-machines are flexible and can be tailored for a wide range of tasks.

exercises.prompt: The Graph state-machine helps with ______ decisions based on relationships.
exercises.sentence: The Graph state-machine helps with *strategic* decisions based on relationships.
exercises.explain: The Graph state-machine focuses on making strategic decisions based on the connections between points.

exercises.prompt: Which statement is generated by AI?

options.text: The Crew state-machine works best for paths through graphs.
State-machines can map different problem sets effectively.
All tasks require a Graph state-machine.

exercises.explain: The AI-generated statement highlights the versatility of state-machines in addressing various tasks.

exercises.prompt: What type of state-machine would you choose for a project involving many agents? Why?

options.text: Custom; it's flexible for any task.
Crew; it coordinates efforts among agents.

exercises.explain: Choosing the Crew state-machine is essential for coordinating efforts among many agents effectively.
